profiles.name: Home Renovation Lead Qualification
profiles.scriptSummary: Qualify inbound home renovation leads, capture the caller's project need, urgency, contact details, and confirm a clear next step for the sales team.
goals: Capture name and preferred contact detail
Ask about budget range or project size
Confirm that a team member will follow up
End with a clear next step
negativeSignals: Caller is confused about next step
Caller asks for pricing but no follow-up is offered
Caller refuses to share contact details
Agent ends call without confirming callback
Caller asks to speak with a human

parameters.title: Project need captured
parameters.description: Evaluate whether the agent clearly identified what home renovation project the caller is interested in, such as kitchen remodel, bathroom renovation, flooring, painting, roofing, or general renovation. Mark as failed if the caller showed interest but the agent did not clarify the project type.
parameters.recommendation: Update the script so the agent asks: "What type of renovation project are you considering?"
parameters.promptGuidance: After the caller shows interest, ask one clear question to identify the project type before collecting contact details.

parameters.title: Budget and timeline qualified
parameters.description: Evaluate whether the agent asked about the caller's expected project timeline and budget range, and captured enough information for the sales team to prioritize the lead. This passes if the caller shares either a clear timeline, budget range, or urgency level and the agent acknowledges it.
successSignals: when are you looking to start
failureSignals: caller asks price but agent does not qualify
parameters.recommendation: Coach the agent to ask one simple qualifying question about timeline or budget before ending the call.
parameters.promptGuidance: Before confirming the next step, ask: "Do you have a rough timeline or budget range in mind for this project?"
